_comment: CATALOGUE manifest. The file actually polled by case-service is official/sources.json; keep this entry in sync with it. Tier is re-derived by _effective_tier (org velaris-app-os AND under official/ AND id in official_registry.json), never trusted from here.
name: HxStorefront
description: Hosted store builder for Velaris clients with no existing website. Branded product catalogue, visual theme + page builder, categories, inventory, promotions, SEO, and a public storefront at /store/:slug — all from Studio. Every purchase flows through HxCheckout to become an Order case in Velaris. Installing it turns on /api/v1/storefront (+ the public storefront API) and the Studio HxStorefront module for the tenant.

versions.release_notes: Initial release. Store + catalogue + theme/page builder + inventory + promotions + media + public storefront + HxCheckout order bridge.
